description: CompositionWhite and blue striped polo T-shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a blue shirt collar, short sleeves, buttoned chest placket, branding appliquéd on the left chest and a vented hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsVintage styling on this classic T-shirt is a sure fire way of upping your style statement in your off-duty ensembles. This striped tee from locomotive is crafted from soft cotton to offer exemplary comfort which, along with its fashionable styling, makes this a great addition to your wardrobe. Pair it with form fitting denims and casual shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size S on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
